title: Issue 140 Source-Material Embedding Index Run
subtitle: Inference-time Codex run for delivering a managed source-material retrieval index.
scope: GitHub issue #140 in triadflow/living-doc-compositor and child tickets #141 through #146.
sourceCoverage: Hydrated from GitHub issue #140, child issues #141 through #146, current source-material helpers, render/test scripts, registry contracts, and existing source-material fixtures.
objective: Deliver GitHub issue #140: build a managed embedding index for living-doc linked source materials so agents can retrieve relevant tickets, PRs, docs, run docs, and source artifacts before canonical verification.
successCondition: A living doc can link a source material item and have it queued/indexed incrementally; indexed entries include stable source identity, freshness/provenance/permission metadata, chunk and embedding metadata, and living-doc backlinks; retrieval returns ranked relevant source materials with canonical links; the inference living-doc run flow can consume the shortlist while still verifying canonical sources before status changes.

objectiveFacets.name: Frame objective
objectiveFacets.description: Issue #140 is treated as an implementation epic with six child delivery tracks, not only a research note.

objectiveFacets.name: Source identity schema
objectiveFacets.description: Stable canonical identity, source type, repo/scope, freshness, permission/provenance, chunk, embedding, status, and backlink fields exist outside portable living-doc JSON.

objectiveFacets.name: Incremental indexing
objectiveFacets.description: A CLI can scan one living-doc JSON, normalize linked source references, compare freshness/hash/model state, and enqueue only new, changed, stale, failed, or unsupported sources.

objectiveFacets.name: GitHub fetching
objectiveFacets.description: GitHub issue and PR references can be normalized and represented as canonical source records with current state, metadata, comments, and explicit inaccessible states.

objectiveFacets.name: Chunk and embedding storage
objectiveFacets.description: Normalized source text is chunked deterministically and stored with model/version metadata in a local derived index.

objectiveFacets.name: Retrieval hydration
objectiveFacets.description: A query helper returns ranked source and chunk candidates with canonical links, match notes, freshness/access status, and living-doc backlinks for inference-run hydration.

objectiveFacets.name: Freshness and permission governance
objectiveFacets.description: Retrieval surfaces stale, changed, inaccessible, deleted, private, unsupported, and embedding-model-stale states and does not treat derived retrieval as verification evidence.

objectiveFacets.name: Verify outcome
objectiveFacets.description: Focused tests and CLI smoke checks prove schema, scanning, GitHub normalization, chunking, retrieval, and stale/inaccessible handling.

objectiveFacets.name: Finalize handoff
objectiveFacets.description: Committed source changes, PR linkage, issue update, verification evidence, and residual risks are recorded.

invariants.name: Derived index is not canonical
invariants.statement: Do not store embeddings directly in portable living-doc JSON and do not treat index text, chunks, summaries, or retrieval rank as canonical truth.

invariants.name: Verification before status
invariants.statement: Do not mark objectiveReady true unless source changes are committed, focused verification is linked, a PR is opened or updated, and issue #140 is updated.

invariants.name: Freshness before action
invariants.statement: Retrieved candidates may hydrate context, but source-of-truth GitHub or file state must be rechecked before acting or upgrading status.

invariants.name: Local first storage
invariants.statement: Keep the first implementation local-file based and repo-scoped; do not design a broad hosted search product before the repo/source-material workflow works.

callouts.title: Run state
items: Current phase: source implementation committed and verified locally.
Next delivery action: push branch, open PR, update issue #140, then finalize readiness.

sections.title: Issue Orbit
sections.rationale: Issue #140 is an epic whose acceptance criteria are distributed across child tickets #141 through #146.

data.name: #140 - Epic: Source-material embedding index for living-doc retrieval
data.relevance: Defines the end-to-end source-material index, retrieval, freshness, and inference-run hydration acceptance criteria.

data.name: #141 - Define source-material index schema and identity contract
data.relevance: Owns the derived index record shape and stable source identity contract.

data.name: #142 - Index newly linked living-doc source materials incrementally
data.relevance: Owns the living-doc scanner and queue/report behavior for new, changed, unchanged, failed, and unsupported sources.

data.name: #143 - Add GitHub issue and PR source fetcher for the embedding index
data.relevance: Owns GitHub issue/PR normalization and canonical metadata capture.

data.name: #144 - Implement chunking and embedding storage for indexed source materials
data.relevance: Owns deterministic chunking, local derived storage, and model/version-aware regeneration.

data.name: #145 - Add semantic source retrieval for inference living-doc run hydration
data.relevance: Owns query-time shortlist results for inference-run hydration.

data.name: #146 - Add freshness, permissions, and provenance checks to source-material retrieval
data.relevance: Owns stale, inaccessible, deleted, private, changed-source, and embedding-model-stale reporting.

sections.title: Decisions
sections.rationale: The issue declares several architectural constraints that must stay authoritative during implementation.

data.name: Embedding index is derived cache data
notes: Embeddings and chunk metadata belong outside portable living-doc JSON.
GitHub, local files, connector sources, and living-doc JSON remain canonical.

data.name: Local repo workflow before hosted product
notes: The issue explicitly excludes a broad multi-tenant search product before the local repo/source-material workflow works.

sections.title: Implementation Capabilities
sections.rationale: The epic decomposes into parallel implementation capabilities with comparable built/partial/gap status.

data.name: Source-material index schema and identity contract
notes: The record contract includes stable sourceId, sourceType, canonical identity, status, freshness, permissions, provenance, backlinks, chunks, and embedding metadata.

data.name: Incremental living-doc source scan and queue
notes: Implemented CLI action: node scripts/source-material-index.mjs scan <doc.json>.

The scan action normalizes refs, writes local index state, compares content hash/model state, and reports indexed, queued, skipped, changed, inaccessible, unsupported, and embedding-model-stale actions.

data.name: GitHub issue and PR source fetcher
notes: Implemented GitHub issue/PR URL parsing, payload normalization, and a fetch-github CLI path that uses gh api when live access is available.
Core parser and normalizer are covered without requiring live network access.

data.name: Chunking and local embedding store
notes: Implemented deterministic text chunking and local-hash vectors with model/version and vector dimension metadata.
.living-doc-source-index/ is gitignored as derived local cache state.

data.name: Semantic shortlist retrieval for inference runs
notes: Implemented CLI action: node scripts/source-material-index.mjs query <text>.
Results include ranked sources, chunk ids, text previews, canonical paths or URLs, backlinks, freshness/access metadata, retrieval notes, and verificationRequired=true.

data.name: Freshness, permission, provenance, and status reporting
notes: Implemented freshness content hashes, inaccessible local-source status, unsupported symbolic/remote non-GitHub stubs, changed-source scan actions, and embedding-model-stale scan actions.
GitHub permission/access failures are represented as inaccessible records in the live fetch path.

sections.title: Code Anchors
sections.rationale: Initial source hydration identified exact existing files that shape implementation and verification.

data.name: Existing MCP source-material helper shape
data.what_it_does: Exposes source add/create/link helpers and writes source material under docs/source-material for local JSON/Markdown artifacts.
why_it_matters: The embedding index should discover and index linked source material without changing canonical living-doc JSON ownership.

data.name: Current contract test entry point
data.what_it_does: Runs rendered-doc contract checks through Node scripts.
why_it_matters: The new index tests should fit the existing Node-based contract style and avoid network-dependent assertions.

data.name: Existing source-material artifact directory
data.what_it_does: Holds derived/local source artifacts such as evidence bundles and settings-toggle evidence.
why_it_matters: The index should live outside portable docs but can reference this source-material area and keep generated local index data gitignored.

data.name: Source-material index CLI and module
data.what_it_does: Collects living-doc source refs, normalizes identities, hydrates local source chunks and vectors, queues GitHub sources, reports freshness/access actions, queries ranked candidates, and optionally fetches GitHub issue/PR payloads through gh.
why_it_matters: This is the source implementation that satisfies the local-first derived index and inference-run hydration path for issue #140.

data.name: Source-material index contract test
data.what_it_does: Covers GitHub issue/PR parsing and normalization, scan action reporting, local chunk/vector persistence, unchanged skips, content changes, embedding model staleness, inaccessible and unsupported states, and retrieval ranking.
why_it_matters: This is the executable evidence for the schema, indexing, retrieval, and freshness facets.

sections.title: Verification Plan
sections.rationale: Issue #140 needs evidence across schema, scanner, GitHub normalization, chunking, retrieval, and stale/inaccessible handling.

data.name: Contract and CLI verification
data.currentCoverage: tests/contract/source-material-index.spec.mjs covers identity normalization, GitHub issue and PR payload normalization, scan action reporting, local chunk/vector persistence, unchanged skip behavior, changed-source detection, embedding-model-stale reporting, inaccessible and unsupported states, and ranked retrieval output.
data.nextStep: Push branch, open PR, and use issue #140 as the source-system coordination record.
gaps: Live GitHub fetch is intentionally not required for core tests.
The first embedding provider is deterministic local hashing; a later provider can replace it through the recorded provider/model boundary.

sections.title: Proof Ladder
sections.rationale: The run needs staged proof from schema to CLI behavior to inference-run readiness.

data.name: Schema and identity contract exists
notes: Ready: docs/source-material-index.md documents the schema and tests cover GitHub issue, GitHub PR, local file, and living-doc JSON identities.

data.name: Incremental indexing behavior works locally
notes: Ready: CLI scan reports indexed, queued, skipped, unsupported, inaccessible, changed-source, and embedding-model-stale actions from deterministic fixtures.

data.name: Retrieval hydrates inference-run candidates
notes: Ready: query results rank semantically related candidates with canonical paths, chunk IDs, backlinks, freshness/access status, retrieval notes, and verificationRequired=true.

sections.title: Attempt Log
sections.rationale: Actions taken during the run should record what they proved and where shipped evidence lives.

data.name: Initial governed source hydration
data.cost_to_apply: One run-doc checkpoint before code work.
what_tried: Read issue #140, child issues #141 through #146, registry contracts, current source-material helpers, render scripts, and test structure.
what_proved: The issue has a local-first implementation path spanning schema, scan queue, GitHub normalization, chunk/storage, retrieval, and freshness/access governance.

data.name: Source-material index implementation
data.cost_to_apply: One local CLI/module, schema doc, fixtures, and contract test suite integration.
what_tried: Added scripts/source-material-index.mjs, docs/source-material-index.md, source-index fixtures, contract tests, test:contract wiring, and .living-doc-source-index/ gitignore coverage.
what_proved: A living doc can now be scanned into a local derived index, local files can be chunked and embedded, GitHub issues/PRs are normalized or queued for canonical fetch, retrieval returns ranked candidates, and freshness/access/provenance warnings are preserved.
